title: Before the Queen Elizabeth II Cup

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy! Is this seat free?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh... S-Sweep. Yes, please sit down!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I heard about the autumn Tenno Sho. You won,
right?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...I did.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: And I intend to win the Japan Cup next as well.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Um, Sweep! Can I say something?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You said in an interview before that you were
going to run in the Triple Tiara tour in your classic
year...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And that in your senior year, you're going to beat
people from the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And finally... you're going to cast your racing
magic on the world.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean you've already decided which
race you're going to use to cast that spell?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, I did plan on making the choice
myself, but...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You decide for me, Familiar.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our choices are the Hanshin J.F., the Triple Tiara,
and the Queen Elizabeth II Cup...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is a first. She's come to me for advice before,
but the final decision has always been hers.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You choose!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: C'mon! It's been months since I gave you permission to advise me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Are you telling me you haven't grown at all as my
familiar? You haven't been putting in any effort
all this time?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're not fooling anyone! I know you've
improved!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now that we're clear, you need to start thinking.
...Oh, but you better make sure you watch the
Queen Elizabeth II Cup today too!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna become the representative for the
runners on all the Triple Tiara tours, so you better
be watching. And then make your mind up once
I'm done.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You get to decide what race I'm gonna use to
change the world!
